sections.heading: What are EMV® Specifications?
sections.bodyMd: Conforme a documentação fonte: EMV Specifications are designed to be global, meaning any business in any country can adopt them and expect their products and solutions to work everywhere. (tradução e condensação pedagógica; termos técnicos preservados na íntegra na seção de detalhes).
sections.btgpayNote: Fundamentos EMV orientam decisões de produto no BtgPay: CP vs CNP, fluxo chip/contactless e papéis de emissor, adquirente e terminal (incluindo smartphone como POI).

verification.evidence: EMV Specifications are designed to be global, meaning any business in any country can adopt them and expect their products and solutions to work everywhere.
